about.title: About NMCL
about.content: The National Muslim Council of Liberia (NMCL) is the unified voice of Muslims in Liberia, representing the interests of the Muslim community and promoting Islamic values, education, and social welfare throughout the country.

mainContent.mission: To unite, serve, and advocate for the Muslim community of Liberia while promoting peace, education, and social harmony.
mainContent.vision: A thriving Muslim community contributing positively to Liberia's national development and upholding Islamic principles.
